original_poem:
सितारों से आगे जहाँ और भी हैं,  
अब तक तेरा ही नाम लूँ,  
इस राह के हर मोड़ पर,  
तेरे ही ख़्वाब सजाऊं।  

जिन्हें ख़ुदा ने हमें दिया है,  
उनसे बड़ा एक और जहाँ है,  
जहाँ जा कर सजे हैं सपने,  
असीमित हो ये आसमान।
translated_poem:
A world beyond the stars exists,  
Yet, I still call out your name,  
At every bend of this path,  
I weave your dreams anew.  

What God has bestowed upon us,  
Is but a glimpse of another realm,  
Where dreams are adorned,  
In an infinite sky's embrace.

preprocessing.alignment_note: Source and translation stanza counts match.

metaphor_spans.abstract_meaning: each turning point in the speaker's life journey where the beloved's presence is felt
the act of adorning one's inner world exclusively with the beloved's image
each turning point in life's journey
life's transitions and journey
nurturing hopes and memories

a winding road with the beloved's dreams woven like decorations at each bend
